questions.question: Which of the following correctly matches the fungal reproduction type with its example?
questions.hint: Penicillium is an ascomycetes that produces meiospores called ascospores.
questions.solution: Penicillium is an Ascomycete and produces ascospores in asci inside an ascarp. Agaricus produces basidiospores; Rhizopus produces sporangiospores.
